00109|
${device.device_name}
00110|

00113|
${device.power_watts.toFixed(1)} kWh

00126| }); 00127| 00128| // Estimate cost (assuming $0.12 per kWh) 00129| const avgPowerKW = totalPower / data.length / 1000; 00130| const hoursPerMonth = 730; 00131| const costPerKWh = 0.12; 00132| const totalCost = avgPowerKW * hoursPerMonth * costPerKWh;
